name: Multi-Agent
description: Role-based multi-agent coordination: head agent delegates tasks to specialist sub-agents.

agents.description: Per-agent metadata keyed by agent ID.

role.description: Agent role. 'head' can delegate; 'specialist' receives delegated tasks.

delegatesTo.description: Agent IDs this head agent is allowed to delegate to.

agents.label: Agent Role Config
agents.help: Map of agentId → { role, delegatesTo }. Set role='head' on the manager and 'specialist' on sub-agents.
